calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Garson Soe for petitioner Jean Chin (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Spousal Property.

The Court inquired why the spousal property petition should not be taken off calendar. Mr. Soe stated that he believed the petition should go off calendar.

The Court ordered the petition off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Oct-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
1) PTR-25-308284, re: Frank S.Y. Chin Revocable Trust; and
2) PES-24-307978, Estate of Frank Chin

Appearances:
Garson C. Soe appeared for petitioner Jean Y. Chin.

The matter came on for hearing on: 1) Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets; and 2) Spousal Property Petition.

Mr. Soe requested a continuance in both the estate and trust matters in order to address examiner's notes and sought clarification regarding the validity of the trust. Counsel explained that the trust was notarized in Oregon and questioned the examiner's statement that the trust was "not valid." The Court advised counsel to continue efforts to contact the examiner directly for clarification. The Court also confirmed that the decedent was the same individual referenced in the record as Frank Chin, Frank S. Chin, and Frank S.Y. Chin.

Following discussion, the Court continued both matters to October 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Garson Soe appeared via zoom for Jean Chin(petitioner).

Mr. Soe stated that he misunderstood the examiner, that he thought the matter would go off calendar, that he didn't think it would be set for a future hearing date, and that he requests the Petition for Spousal Property to be continued to the same date as the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets in case PTR-25-308284.

Petition for Spousal Property is continued to August 20, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Court ordered to the Order of Status Hearing off calendar.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Continued To Jul-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Garson Craig Soe (attorney) to appear on July 1, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Spousal Property Petition is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Continued To Apr-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 6, 1997 is admitted to probate. Ruth Grdseloff is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
